name: argo-architect
description: A closed-loop architecture control system that enforces strong consistency between ArchiMate architectural intent and real code structure via semantic UML extraction.

argo.plantuml.validationMode.description: How Argo performs full PlantUML compile validation before saving diagrams. 'auto' tries the plantuml CLI first, then java -jar when a jar path is configured.

argo.plantuml.command.description: Executable name or absolute path for the PlantUML CLI used when validationMode is 'auto' or 'cli'.

argo.plantuml.commandArgs.description: Additional arguments passed before Argo's render arguments when invoking the PlantUML CLI.

argo.plantuml.javaCommand.description: Java executable name or absolute path used for java -jar validation. Falls back to the PlantUML extension's plantuml.java setting, then 'java'.

argo.plantuml.javaArgs.description: Additional JVM arguments passed before -jar during PlantUML validation.

argo.plantuml.jarPath.description: Absolute path to plantuml.jar used when validationMode is 'java-jar' or as a fallback in 'auto'. Falls back to the PlantUML extension's plantuml.jar setting when present.

argo.plantuml.jarArgs.description: Additional PlantUML jar arguments passed before Argo's render arguments during validation.

chatParticipants.name: argowork
chatParticipants.description: Execute architecture-linked testcases and prepare repair handoffs for the Copilot main agent.

commands.name: brief
commands.description: Generate a main-agent handoff prompt for an external-facing product brief based on the current repository.

commands.name: testdesign
commands.description: Generate a main-agent handoff prompt for designing or adjusting the right test strategy and test cases for the current requirement or issue.

commands.name: work
commands.description: Run every testcase acceptance script declared in design/KG/SystemArchitecture.json, record failures, and prepare the development handoff.

languageModelTools.name: argo-test
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run all testcase acceptance scripts declared in design/KG/SystemArchitecture.json and return a structured summary of passed and failed architecture-linked tests.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Run architecture-linked acceptance tests from design/KG/SystemArchitecture.json.

architecturePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the architecture graph JSON file. Defaults to design/KG/SystemArchitecture.json.
